data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_ERRORCONNECTING
data.value: {0}: se kanekt karane ka prayaas karate samay truti ({1})

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FS_NEEDSLOCALDIR
data.value: ek sthaaneey nirdeshika darj karen. ".." vaapas jaane ke lie.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FS_NEEDSREMOTEDIR
data.value: ek doorasth nirdeshika darj karen. ".." vaapas jaane ke lie

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_FS_COMMAND_PWDL_DESC
data.value: vartamaan sthaaneey nirdeshika praapt karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_FS_COMMAND_PWDR_DESC
data.value: vartamaan rimot nirdeshika praapt karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FS_COMMAND_CDL_DESC
data.value: se daunalod ya apalod karane ke lie sthaaneey nirdeshika badalata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FS_COMMAND_CDR_DESC
data.value: se daunalod ya apalod karane ke lie doorasth nirdeshika badalata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FS_COMMAND_DEL_DESC
data.value: sarvar se doorasth fail hata deta hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FS_COMMAND_GET_DESC
data.value: dviaadhaaree ya paath ka upayog kar sthaaneey nirdeshika mein doorasth fail daunalod karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FS_COMMAND_PUT_DESC
data.value: bainaree ya tekst ka upayog kar doorasth nirdeshika mein sthaaneey fail apalod karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_COMMAND_FTP_DESC
data.value: sarvar ke saath sanvaad karane ke lie ek efateepee khol ka prayog karen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_CONNECTING
data.value: profail {1} se {0} se kanekt karane ka prayaas kar raha hai ...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_SUMFILE_DESC
data.value: fail rakam kee ganana karata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_NOPROFILESORTIMEOUT
data.value: {0} se kanekt karane ka prayaas karate samay truti: kanekshan taimaut ya khoya kanekshan

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_SUMFILES_DESC
data.value: nirdisht nirdeshika mein failon kee rakam kee ganana karata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_PREPARINGPROFILES
data.value: profail taiyaar kar raha hai ... isamen kaee minat lag sakate hain ...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_VALIDATIONFAILED_MESSAGE
data.value: pramaanapatr satyaapan ke dauraan, pramaanapatr trutiyaan hain. yah pahalee baar ho sakata hai ki aap sarvar se jude hon ya pramaanapatr kee samay seema samaapt ho gaee ho. yahaan ek truti hai:

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_VALIDATIONFAILED_PROMPT
data.value: kya aap vaakee kanekt karana chaahate hain?

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_VALIDATIONFAILED_INVALID
data.value: amaany uttar. krpaya pun: prayaas karen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_ONLYFIRSTPROFILE_NAME
data.value: keval pahale efateepee profail par lauten

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_GET_FAILED
data.value: fail {0} ke lie daunalod viphal raha.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_LIST_FAILED
data.value: doorasth failon ko soocheebaddh karane mein viphal: {0}

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_NOTFOUND
data.value: {0} sarvar mein nahin paaya jaata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_MV_DESC
data.value: fail ya nirdeshika ko kisee any fail ya nirdeshika mein le jaata hai. aap failon ka naam badalane ke lie bhee isaka upayog kar sakate hain.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_MOVEFAILED
data.value: {0} ko {1} mein le jaane mein viphal.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_CP_DESC
data.value: fail ya nirdeshika ko kisee any fail ya nirdeshika mein kopee karata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_LOGFTPUSERNAME_DESC
data.value: efateepee yoozaranem log in karen ya nahin.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_LOGFTPIPADDRESS_DESC
data.value: efateepee aaeepee pate par log in karen ya nahin.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_ONLYFIRSTPROFILE_DESC
data.value: kanekt karate samay pahalee profail chunen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_EXCEPTION_SHELLERROR
data.value: ftp shel mein ek truti thee:

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_PERM_DESC
data.value: fail anumatiyaan set karata hai. yah keval yooniks chalaane vaale ftp sarvar par samarthit hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_TYPE_DESC
data.value: is satr ke lie prakaar set karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_PERM_SETFAILED
data.value: {0} kee anumatiyon ko {1} par set karane mein viphal.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_PERM_SETSUCCEEDED
data.value: fail ke lie anumatiyaan saphalataapoorvak set kee gaeen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_TYPE_ASCII_WARNING
data.value: saavadhaan rahen ki adhikaansh failen is mod ka upayog karake theek se daunalod ya apalod nahin hongee, isalie ham adhikaansh sthitiyon mein bainaree mod ka upayog karane kee atyadhik anushansa karate hain.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_GETFOLDER_DESC
data.value: bainaree ya tekst ka upayog karake doorasth foldar ko sthaaneey nirdeshika mein daunalod karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_PUTFOLDER_DESC
data.value: bainaree ya tekst ka upayog karake sthaaneey foldar ko doorasth nirdeshika mein apalod karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_GETFOLDER_DOWNLOADFAILED
data.value: foldar {0} ke lie daunalod viphal raha.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPHTTPSFTP_SETTINGS_USERNAMEPROMPT_DESC
data.value: likhen ki aap apane login prompt ko kaise chaahate hain. difolt shailee ka upayog karane ke lie khaalee chhod den. plesaholdars ko paars kiya jaata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPHTTPSFTP_SETTINGS_PASSWORDPROMPT_DESC
data.value: likhen ki aap kaise chaahate hain ki aapaka paasavard sheeghr ho. difolt shailee ka upayog karane ke lie khaalee chhod den. plesaholdars ko paars kiya jaata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_FILEDETAILS_NAME
data.value: efateepee soochee mein fail vivaran dikhaen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_USERNAMEPROMPT_NAME
data.value: efateepee ke lie upayogakarta naam sheeghr shailee

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_PASSWORDPROMPT_NAME
data.value: efateepee ke lie paasavard sheeghr shailee

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_FIRSTPROFILE_NAME
data.value: pahale efateepee profail ka prayog karen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_NEWCONNECTIONS_NAME
data.value: ftp speed daayal mein nae kanekshan joden

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_VALIDATESECUREFTP_NAME
data.value: surakshit ftp pramaanapatr satyaapit karane ka prayaas karen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_ACCEPTINVALIDCERTS_NAME
data.value: hamesha amaany ftp pramaanapatr sveekaar karen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_FILEDETAILS_DESC
data.value: doorasth nirdeshikaon ko soocheebaddh karate samay ftp fail vivaran dikhaata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_FIRSTPROFILE_DESC
data.value: ftp se kanekt karane ke lie pahale ftp profail ka upayog karata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_NEWCONNECTIONS_DESC
data.value: saksham hone par, ftp speed daayal mein ek naya kanekshan jodata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_VALIDATESECUREFTP_DESC
data.value: ftp pramaanapatron ko maany karane ka prayaas karata hai. ise band karane kee anushansa nahin kee jaatee hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_SHOWFTPMOTD_DESC
data.value: login par din ka efateepee sandesh dikhaata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_ACCEPTINVALIDCERTS_DESC
data.value: hamesha amaany ftp pramaanapatr sveekaar karen. ise chaaloo karane kee anushansa nahin kee jaatee hai kyonki isase suraksha jokhim ho sakate hain.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_EXCEPTION_REMOTEFILENEEDED_HASH
data.value: haish karane ke lie ek doorasth fail darj karen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_RECHASHING_DESC
data.value: nirdeshika ko punaraavartee haish karana hai ya nahin. krpaya dhyaan den ki sabhee ftp sarvar isaka samarthan nahin karate hain.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_EXECUTE_DESC
data.value: ek ftp sarvar kamaand nishpaadit karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_VERIFYRETRYATTEMPTS_NAME
data.value: efateepee sancharan ke lie pun: prayaas prayaas satyaapit karen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_VERIFYRETRYATTEMPTS_DESC
data.value: apalod ko satyaapit karane ke lie kitanee baar aur daunalod ko pooree tarah se viphal hone se pahale satyaapan viphal hone par punah prayaas karen?

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_FTPCONNECTIONTIMEOUT_DESC
data.value: ftp kanekshan taimaut se pahale kitane mileesekand prateeksha karen?

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_FTPDATACONNECTIONTIMEOUT_DESC
data.value: ftp deta kanekshan taimaut se pahale kitane mileesekand prateeksha karen?

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_FTPIPVERS_DESC
data.value: intaranet protokol ka vah sanskaran chunen jisaka efateepee sarvar samarthan karata hai aur jise efateepee klaint upayog karata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_SWITCH_SHOWDETAILS_DESC
data.value: soochee mein fail vivaran dikhaata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_SWITCH_SUPPRESSMESSAGES_DESC
data.value: kashtaprad "anumati asveekrt" sandeshon ko dabaata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_FILEFOLDERCANTOPEN
data.value: fail ya foldar nahin khola ja sakata

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_FSENTRY_NOTDOTNETASSEMBLY
data.value: fail ek maany .nait asembalee nahin hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_CANTGETFSINFO
data.value: fail sistam jaanakaaree praapt nahin kee ja sakatee

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_CANTCOPY
data.value: fail ya nirdeshika kee pratilipi nahin banaee ja sakatee

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_CANTMOVE
data.value: fail ya nirdeshika ko sthaanaantarit nahin kiya ja sakata

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_CANTREMOVE
data.value: fail ya nirdeshika ko hataaya nahin ja sakata

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_COPYPROMPT
data.value: chayanit fail ko kopee karane ke lie gantavy foldar ka path ya poora path darj karen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_NEEDSCORRECTPATH
data.value: sunishchit karen ki aapane sahee path likha hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_FILENOTFOUND
data.value: fail maujood nahin hai. sunishchit karen ki aapane sahee path likha hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_MOVEPROMPT
data.value: chayanit fail ko le jaane ke lie gantavy foldar ka path ya poorn path darj karen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_FILENAMEINVALID
data.value: sunishchit karen ki aapane sahee fail naam likha hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_FILEFOUND
data.value: fail pahale se maujood hai. naam kisee any fail dvaara kabja nahin kiya jaana chaahie.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_FOLDERFOUND
data.value: foldar pahale se maujood hai. naam kisee any foldar dvaara kabja nahin kiya jaana chaahie.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_EXCEPTION_NEEDSCONNECTION
data.value: kanekshan abhee tak sthaapit nahin hua hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_COMMAND_CAT_DESC
data.value: kansol par rimot fail kee saamagree padhata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_COMMAND_DETACH_DESC
data.value: diskanekt kie bina shel se baahar nikalata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_CORRECTPORTREQUIRED
data.value: sunishchit karen ki aapane port ko sahee tareeke se nirdisht kiya hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_CONNECT_LISTPROFILE_PROMPT
data.value: ek se adhik profail milee. ek ka chayan karen:

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPHTTPSFTP_DELETECONFIRM
data.value: kya aap vaakee {0} ko hataana chaahate hain?

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_SETTINGS_ENTRYDESC
data.value: yah anubhaag aapako konfigar karane deta hai ki ftp shel kaise kaam karata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_EXCEPTION_REGISTEREDHANDLERFAILED
data.value: haindalar panjeekrt hai, lekin kisee tarah eksatenshan haindalar praapt karane mein viphal raha

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_SETTINGS_EXCEPTION_ENTRIESFAILED
data.value: setings pravishtiyaan praapt karane mein viphal.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_EXCEPTION_LASTSHELLTYPEMISMATCH
data.value: antim shel yah shel nahin hai jisase alag kiya ja sake.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_EXCEPTION_NOCLIENT
data.value: abhee tak koee ftp klaint nahin hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_COMMAND_FTP_ARGUMENT_SERVER_DESC
data.value: kanekt karane ke lie ftp sarvar

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_COMMAND_DEL_ARGUMENT_REMOTEFILE_DESC
data.value: hataane ke lie doorasth fail ka path

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_EXECUTE_ARGUMENT_COMMAND_DESC
data.value: nishpaadit karane ke lie sarvar kamaand

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_MV_ARGUMENT_SOURCEFILEORDIR_DESC
data.value: srot fail ya nirdeshika ka path

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_MV_ARGUMENT_TARGETFILEORDIR_DESC
data.value: lakshy fail ya nirdeshika ka path

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_COMMAND_TYPE_ARGUMENT_TYPE_DESC
data.value: nirdisht karata hai ki sthaanaantaran prakaar aschii ya bainaree hai
